policy: All UI icons, fonts and the MediaPipe runtime are local. Before build, the official Google HandLandmarker task is downloaded once, checksum-verified and copied to public/vendor/models. No runtime hand-model download is permitted.
note: Kurdish UI uses local Noto Kufi Arabic. Smart Shape 2.0, Workspace Navigator, Loading Experience, Performance Guard and Hand Calibration run locally in the browser.

interfaceIconSystem.method: Semantic CSS mask classes backed by local SVG assets

releaseStatus: v5.0.9 synchronizes the official checksum-pinned HandLandmarker task before static build, then serves the verified task locally with a cache-busted model URL.
